title: Make this a subproject of Podman Container Tools
body:
This moves the container-libs project - a critical dependency of Podman - part of the Podman Container Tools CNCF project.

Preliminary voting was conducted in #876 with no dissent.

<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

comments.body: This should be acked by at least 4 Podman Container Tools core maintainers to confirm.
That's 4 core maintainers counting me. Merging.
